segments.text: To you, Lord, I call; you are my Rock, do not turn a deaf ear to me. For if you remain silent, I will be like those who go down to the pit.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Hear my cry for mercy as I call to you for help, when I lift up my hands toward your Most Holy Place.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: thy…: or, the oracle of thy sanctuary

segments.text: Do not drag me away with the wicked, with those who do evil, who speak cordially with their neighbors but harbor malice in their hearts.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Repay them for their deeds and for what they have done— bring them the reward they deserve.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Since they have no regard for the deeds of the Lord and what his hands have done, he will tear them down and never rebuild them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Praise be to the Lord, for he has heard my cry for mercy.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusts in him, and he helps me. My heart leaps for joy, and with my song I praise him.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The Lord is the strength of his people, a fortress of salvation for his anointed one.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Save your people and bless your inheritance; be their shepherd and carry them forever.
segments.speaker: David
